en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: ’inavayan! pananadam ku harem kaninmu mapiya da kumuda marengay kana “akanen” na Kasavakan.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的建和語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say \\\"food\\\" in Kasavakan.
A: Do you understand what I’m saying?

ab: Sinsi, ma’ulid ku, karuwa u diya masalr marengay?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。你可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: adi ku kinger, katamuniyu diya marengay.
ch: B:我聽不到，請再大聲一點說話。
en: B: I can’t hear you, please speak louder.

ab: na’uwi diya kani! itulusay ku diya miyup.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
Hmm! It’s well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Sinsi, malalup ku minada da impic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Sinsi, malalup ku minada da aicur.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kivuras diya kananu ngidilan na lralrang.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pavurasay ku diya da aicur ay?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: ta palruway lra kani, nu masalr diya saliyusan marepana’uwa ta diya.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
